import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Get Imported API Key"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/v2/admin/importedApiKeys/{key_id}"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

Retrieves details about a specific imported key. Returns metadata about the imported key. The original raw key is never returned.

```http
GET /v2/admin/importedApiKeys/{key_id}
```

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
